title: Cuneiform Tablet #0710: Achaemenid School Tablet
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. School Tablet document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records school tablet matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
